name: Sour Milk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients quickly until combined.
2. Roll the dough to about 1/2-inch thickness.
3. Fold and roll again to form a rectangle.
4. Cut out biscuits using a biscuit cutter.
5. Place the biscuits on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake immediately in a hot oven (400°F) for about 10 minutes.
6. If the sour milk is very sour, add more baking soda before rolling out the dough again.
